name: Spicy Vegetable Marinade
recipeIngredient: 4 medium carrots - bias-cut into 1/2 inch pieces
4 cups Chinese cabbage, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 medium cucumber, quartered lengthwise, seeded, and cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered saucepan, cook the carrots in boiling water for 10 minutes until tender.
2. Add the cabbage and cucumber; return to boiling.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until vegetables are almost tender.
4. Drain and set aside.
5. In a screwtop jar, combine all remaining ingredients.
6. Cover and shake well.
7. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and cover again.
8. Chill in the refrigerator for several hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
9. Lift the vegetables from the marinade using a slotted spoon.
Makes 4 cups.
